title: Keramka Lite
body:
Keramika is a modpack for comfortable play and content creation.

Keramika Lite is a modpack that will help you fully enjoy the Vanilla and traditional aspects of Minecraft. It includes the best optimization and compatibility.

Stable gameplay is what you need.

Also, for more details, we have: [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/SCfE3nUJg7)
